<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

final class InvoiceController
{
    public function show(Invoice $invoice): void
    {
        var_dump($invoice);
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

function render(array $rows): string
{
    return print_r($rows, true);
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

final class InvoiceController
{
    public function __construct(private LoggerInterface $logger) {}

    public function show(Invoice $invoice): void
    {
        $this->logger->debug('rendering invoice', ['id' => $invoice->id()]);
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

final class InvoiceControllerTest
{
    public function testDebug(): void
    {
        var_dump($this->invoice);
    }
}
